channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bonnie Tyler, singer of 'Total Eclipse of the Heart,' dies at 75
item.description: Tyler died in a hospital in Portugal, her family and team said in a statement.

item.title: Millions of Americans have until July 10 to claim refunds from the IRS
item.description: A federal court ruling allowed some taxpayers to seek refunds related to COVID-era filing deadlines, but that window closes July 10.

item.title: Olympian David Hearn pleads not guilty to charges of damaging Reflecting Pool
item.description: Three-time Olympian David Hearn was indicted July 2, accused of ripping out a portion of sealant from the bottom of the Reflecting Pool.

item.title: Schiff launches inquiry into DOJ's closure of tainted baby formula probe
item.description: Sen. Adam Schiff is launching a congressional inquiry into why the Justice Department closed a long-running criminal investigation into bacteria-tainted baby formula.
